retry_reason: The refcount operation always succeeds (autogroup_kref_get never fails). Even when lock_task_sighand fails, the fallback path returns a valid reference, so there is no failure condition to retry.
contract_summary: Get wrapper: acquires a reference (kref) on an autogroup object. If the task's signal struct is accessible, it returns a reference to the task's autogroup; otherwise, returns a reference to the system-wide autogroup_default. The caller must pair this with autogroup_kref_put to release the reference when done. The returned autogroup pointer is always valid and non-NULL.
